/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-gguf-hash.dir/gguf-hash.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/xxhash.dir/deps/xxhash/xxhash.c.o CMakeFiles/sha1.dir/deps/sha1/sha1.c.o CMakeFiles/sha256.dir/deps/sha256/sha256.c.o -o ../../bin/llama-gguf-hash  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/aiden/Documents/macinit/smarthome APP/smart_home_app/packages/on_device_agent/ios/Classes/llama_cpp_src/build/bin" ../../bin/libggml.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib
